# Architecture Map

This document provides a quick architecture map of the shell, remote micro-apps, shared contracts, and backend integration points.

---

## Runtime Topology

```mermaid
graph TD
  User[User Browser] --> Shell[Shell Host app on 4200]

  Shell --> RA[Risk Assessment 4201]
  Shell --> CD[Compliance Dashboard 4202]
  Shell --> AM[Audit Management 4203]
  Shell --> PM[Policy Management 4204]
  Shell --> IR[Incident Reporting 4205]
  Shell --> VR[Vendor Risk 4206]
  Shell --> PO[Partner Onboarding 4207]

  Shell --> SharedTypes[@shared/types]
  Shell --> SharedAuth[@shared/auth]
  Shell --> SharedUI[@shared/ui-components]
  Shell --> SharedApi[@shared/api-client]
  Shell --> SharedBus[@shared/event-bus]

  RA --> SharedTypes
  RA --> SharedAuth
  RA --> SharedUI
  RA --> SharedApi
  RA --> SharedBus

  CD --> SharedTypes
  CD --> SharedAuth
  CD --> SharedUI
  CD --> SharedApi
  CD --> SharedBus

  AM --> SharedTypes
  AM --> SharedAuth
  AM --> SharedUI
  AM --> SharedApi
  AM --> SharedBus

  PM --> SharedTypes
  PM --> SharedAuth
  PM --> SharedUI
  PM --> SharedApi
  PM --> SharedBus

  IR --> SharedTypes
  IR --> SharedAuth
  IR --> SharedUI
  IR --> SharedApi
  IR --> SharedBus

  VR --> SharedTypes
  VR --> SharedAuth
  VR --> SharedUI
  VR --> SharedApi
  VR --> SharedBus

  PO --> SharedTypes
  PO --> SharedAuth
  PO --> SharedUI
  PO --> SharedApi
  PO --> SharedBus

  SharedApi --> Backend[Backend API on 5000]
  Backend --> SSE[SSE stream at /api/events]
```

---

## Contract Boundaries

| Boundary | Contract Owner | Contract Source | Contract Consumer |
|----------|----------------|-----------------|------------------|
| Shell to remotes | Shell and each app owner | Module Federation remotes map and exported `./Module` | Shell router and lazy imports |
| Cross-app events | Shared platform layer | `@shared/event-bus` event names and typed payloads | Shell and remotes |
| UI and domain types | Shared platform layer | `@shared/types` and shared component APIs | Shell and remotes |
| Frontend to backend | Backend platform layer | REST and SSE contracts in `docs/API.md` | `@shared/api-client` and app features |
| Auth and RBAC | Shared platform layer | `@shared/auth` provider and permission matrix | Shell navigation and app actions |

---

## Deployment Shape

| Surface | Local Runtime | Cloud Runtime |
|--------|---------------|---------------|
| Shell | `http://localhost:4200` | Azure Static Web Apps |
| Remotes | `http://localhost:4201-4207` | Azure Static Web Apps |
| API | `http://localhost:5000/api` | Managed backend runtime |
| Cross-app updates | Browser event bus | Browser event bus |
| Real-time updates | SSE stream | SSE stream |

---

3. `docs/API.md` for backend request and response contracts.
